title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 198.416 - Forms and content set forth in rule
text:
198.416.  Forms and content set forth in rule. — The director of the department of social services shall prescribe by rule the form and content of any document required to be filed pursuant to the provisions of sections 198.401 to 198.436.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1362 § 6) 
Expires 9-30-29; see § 198.439
